description: Process a return for a 'Dell UltraSharp Monitor' (Item Code: DELL-U2723) in NCH Copper Point of Sale. A customer is returning the monitor, which was purchased for $579.99 (Tax Free). Create the inventory item, process a cash sale, and then issue a refund that includes a 15% restocking fee deduction. The refund must include the note 'Open box - 15% fee' and be verified in the transactions list.
